hooks.command: echo "RobotNet10 | $(git branch --show-current) | $(git status --porcelain | wc -l) files modified"

python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); p=data.get('file_path',''); zones=['Motion/','CANOpen/','CiA402/','Services/Navigation/','Services/State/']; hits=[z for z in zones if z in p.replace('\\','/')]; sys.exit(0) if not hits else (print('SAFETY-CRITICAL FILE: '+p), print('Review checklist in .claude/rules/safety-critical.md before proceeding.'), sys.exit(0))"

python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); p=data.get('file_path','').replace('\\','/'); print('SHARED CONTRACT CHANGED — run: dotnet build srcs/RobotNet10/RobotNet10.slnx') if '/Shared/' in p else None; sys.exit(0)"
